title: Test Plan
description: Metadata extracted from a testing-log/<date>_<slug>/test-plan.md file. Represents a branchnux artifact: the verification plan for a surface. Must have a route and a non-empty set of test cases.

folderName.description: Full folder name in date-slug form: YYYY-MM-DD_<kebab-slug>.

route.description: The application route or CLI surface this test plan covers. For web surfaces, typically starts with '/'. For CLI surfaces, the command name. Free text.

hasPlan.description: Whether test-plan.md exists in the folder.

tcCount.description: Number of test cases found in the Test Case Matrix table.

pageType.description: Classifier for the surface type. Informational; used by dashboard tooling.
